ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region in which the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_percentiles" (
  "percentile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentile record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the prices are recorded */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for more granular data */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood for more granular data */,
  "p10_price" REAL /* 10th percentile price */,
  "q1_price" REAL /* 1st quartile price */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price */,
  "p50_price" REAL /* 50th percentile price */,
  "q3_price" REAL /* 3rd quartile price */,
  "p90_price" REAL /* 90th percentile price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the percentile data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_percentiles_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_percentiles_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_percentiles_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price trend record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the trends are recorded */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for more granular data */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood for more granular data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the trends are recorded */,
  "p10_price" REAL /* 10th percentile price */,
  "q1_price" REAL /* 1st quartile price */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price */,
  "p50_price" REAL /* 50th percentile price */,
  "q3_price" REAL /* 3rd quartile price */,
  "p90_price" REAL /* 90th percentile price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country in which the city is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region in which the city is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the city data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city in which the neighborhood is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the neighborhood data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the report is generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price prediction record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the predictions are made */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for more granular data */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood for more granular data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the predictions are made */,
  "predicted_p10_price" REAL /* Predicted 10th percentile price */,
  "predicted_q1_price" REAL /* Predicted 1st quartile price */,
  "predicted_median_price" REAL /* Predicted median price */,
  "predicted_p50_price" REAL /* Predicted 50th percentile price */,
  "predicted_q3_price" REAL /* Predicted 3rd quartile price */,
  "predicted_p90_price" REAL /* Predicted 90th percentile price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the prediction data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_predictions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_predictions_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_predictions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_details" TEXT /* Details of the report requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report approval */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report request being approved */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the request */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes made during the approval process */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the approval was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_approvals_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES report_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_approvals_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_rejections" (
  "rejection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report rejection */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report request being rejected */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date the request was rejected */,
  "rejected_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rejected the request */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rejection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the rejection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rejection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_rejections_rejected_by FOREIGN KEY ("rejected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_rejections_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES report_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price forecast record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the forecasts are made */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for more granular data */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood for more granular data */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the forecast period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the forecast period */,
  "forecasted_p10_price" REAL /* Forecasted 10th percentile price */,
  "forecasted_q1_price" REAL /* Forecasted 1st quartile price */,
  "forecasted_median_price" REAL /* Forecasted median price */,
  "forecasted_p50_price" REAL /* Forecasted 50th percentile price */,
  "forecasted_q3_price" REAL /* Forecasted 3rd quartile price */,
  "forecasted_p90_price" REAL /* Forecasted 90th percentile price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the forecast data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
